message:
test(bootstrap): expand unit test coverage for ceremony, cold recovery, genesis, hardware tokens, and recovery phrases

Add comprehensive test suites across the bootstrap crate modules:

- ceremony: CeremonyId display/serde roundtrip, ParticipantId display,
  ThresholdConfig validation (zero-threshold panic, threshold > total panic),
  timeout configuration, 1-of-1 edge case
- cold_recovery: warning count verification with/without fingerprint,
  standard warning presence assertions (NoAuditHistory, RevocationStateUnknown,
  SingleNodeStart, DataLoss)
- genesis: validation rejects wrong schema version, invalid owner key
  (all-zeros not a valid Ed25519 point), future timestamp
- hardware_token: DetectedToken mechanism checks — CKM_EDDSA for Ed25519,
  CKM_ECDH1_DERIVE for X25519, negative cases for unsupported mechanisms,
  direct CKM_X25519 support
- recovery_phrase: from_words roundtrip, wrong word count rejection,
  to_phrase returns exactly 24 words, entropy extraction
- time_validation: minor formatting

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
